name: simple-single-field-gather
description: Gather a single text field with no validation
dsl:
AGENT gather-test
GOAL: collect user name
GATHER:
  - name: userName
    type: text
    prompt: What is your name?

name: multi-field-gather
dsl:
AGENT gather-test
GOAL: collect info
GATHER:
  - name: email
    type: text
    prompt: What is your email?
  - name: phone
    type: text
    prompt: What is your phone?

name: gather-with-optional-field
description: Gather with one required and one optional field
dsl:
AGENT gather-test
GOAL: collect info
GATHER:
  - name: fullName
    type: text
    prompt: What is your full name?
  - name: nickname
    type: text
    prompt: Do you have a nickname?
    required: false
